Name: Hot Work
Desc:
3-piece set effect: Wearer's Arts Intensity <@ba.vup>+30</>. 
After the wearer applies <#ba.burning>Combustion</>, the wearer gains <@ba.fire>Heat DMG</> +<@ba.vup>50.0%</> for 10s. After the wearer applies <#ba.corrupt>Corrosion</>, the wearer gains <@ba.natur>Nature DMG</> +<@ba.vup>50.0%</> for 10s. The aforementioned effects cannot stack.
